data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a referral leaderboard and gamification features. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete data or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of a leaderboard or gamification system. The linked use case mentions a referral program but lacks specific evidence of how leaderboard or gamification elements are implemented, leading to a clear gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of a referral leaderboard or gamification features.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for leaderboard functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of the referral leaderboard.
